svg.title: Electricity Cost AI System Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing data ingestion, storage, modeling, API, and frontend layers for an electricity cost analysis platform

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about EIA and billing data sources')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about PJM wholesale market data')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about NOAA weather data for HDD CDD')
sendPrompt('Where do retail electricity supply plan rates come from?')
sendPrompt('What regulatory data sources track NJ BPU and SBC rider changes?')
sendPrompt('How does the Airflow batch ingestion DAG work for electricity data?')
sendPrompt('Which data streams use Kafka for real-time ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How does the data quality and schema validator work?')
sendPrompt('What raw data goes into the S3 data lake?')
sendPrompt('How is Snowflake used as the analytics warehouse?')
sendPrompt('What features are stored in the Feast feature store?')
sendPrompt('How does dbt model the billing component tables?')
sendPrompt('What does Spark compute for the feature engineering pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How are inflation adjustments and price normalization done?')
sendPrompt('How does the SHAP and DoWhy causal model measure bill component impact?')
sendPrompt('Which forecasting models are compared: SARIMA, Prophet, TFT?')
sendPrompt('How does the benchmarking model cluster utilities by pricing pattern?')
sendPrompt('How does MLflow model registry manage versioning and serving?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the bill impact API expose?')
sendPrompt('What does the forecast endpoint return and how far out does it predict?')
sendPrompt('How does the plan comparison endpoint simulate fixed vs variable costs?')
sendPrompt('What does the bill component breakdown dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What does the forecast vs actual chart show?')
sendPrompt('How does the US NJ benchmarking choropleth map work?')
sendPrompt('How does the retail plan simulator compare fixed vs variable rates?')

svg.text: Observability: Prometheus + Grafana (latency, drift alerts) · Great Expectations (data quality) · MLflow (model metrics)
Infra: AWS (S3, EC2/EKS, MSK for Kafka) · Terraform IaC · GitHub Actions CI/CD
